title: Clean install launches without crash
preconditions: Fresh build/install for the target OS
steps_actions: Launch TrackClick
steps_expected_result: App starts and the floating toolbar is displayed with no crash or error dialog

title: First-launch permissions
preconditions: First run on a clean profile
steps_actions: On macOS, grant Accessibility when prompted; on Linux, confirm X11/XWayland and libXtst present
steps_expected_result: Clicks are inert until Accessibility is granted (macOS); app injects clicks normally once permission/deps are satisfied

title: Version matches release
steps_actions: Open About / check app version
steps_expected_result: Displayed version matches the release tag

title: Toolbar appears and is draggable
steps_actions: Drag the floating toolbar around the screen
steps_expected_result: Toolbar is frameless and always-on-top and can be repositioned and stays on top of other windows

title: Left/Right/Middle click fire correctly
steps_actions: Trigger Left then Right then Middle click on a target control
steps_expected_result: Each click type registers on the correct target (e.g. context menu on right-click)

title: Click lands at cursor location
preconditions: Test on multi-monitor and with display scaling
steps_actions: Move cursor to a known point and trigger a click
steps_expected_result: Click is delivered at the exact cursor position on all monitors and scaling levels (known Linux regression area)

title: Clean exit with no stuck state
steps_actions: Quit the application
steps_expected_result: App exits cleanly with no orphan process and no stuck modifier keys

title: Single / double / drag clicks
steps_actions: Perform single click
steps_expected_result: Single click registers

steps_actions: Perform double click
steps_expected_result: Double click registers (e.g. opens item / selects word)

steps_actions: Perform drag start then drag stop across text or an icon
steps_expected_result: Selection or move occurs between drag start and stop points

title: Scroll in all directions
steps_actions: Trigger Scroll Up / Down / Left / Right
steps_expected_result: Focused window scrolls in the corresponding direction

title: Modifier toggles are one-shot
steps_actions: Enable Ctrl then perform one click
steps_expected_result: Ctrl applies to that click then auto-clears (toggle resets)

steps_actions: Repeat with Alt and Shift including a modifier+click combo (e.g. Ctrl+click multi-select)
steps_expected_result: Each modifier applies to the next click only and combos behave correctly

title: Dwell click triggers after delay
steps_actions: Hover over a target and hold still
steps_expected_result: A click fires automatically after the configured dwell delay

title: Dwell progress bar and cancel
steps_actions: Hover to start the countdown then move the cursor before it completes
steps_expected_result: Orange progress bar shows accurate countdown and moving the cursor cancels the dwell with no click

title: Dwell settings take effect live
steps_actions: Change dwell time and sensitivity then hover
steps_expected_result: New dwell time/sensitivity is applied immediately without restart

title: Settings persist
steps_actions: Change dwell time, sensitivity, visible buttons, opacity, and icon-only mode then close
steps_expected_result: All changed settings are retained

steps_actions: Restart the app and re-open Settings
steps_expected_result: All previously changed settings survive the restart

title: Button layouts render
steps_actions: Switch layout to Rectangle then Horizontal then Vertical
steps_expected_result: Toolbar re-renders as grid, single row, and single column respectively

title: Opacity and hide buttons
steps_actions: Adjust opacity slider and uncheck some visible buttons
steps_expected_result: Toolbar transparency changes visibly and hidden buttons are removed from the toolbar

title: Language switches live
steps_actions: Switch language through each option (EN, CS, FR, ES, zh-CN, ja, ko)
steps_expected_result: UI updates immediately with no restart for every language

title: No truncated or untranslated strings
steps_actions: Inspect toolbar and Settings dialog in each language
steps_expected_result: No truncated/overflowing labels and no untranslated strings

title: Minimize to tray and restore
steps_actions: Minimize to system tray then double-click the tray icon
steps_expected_result: App minimizes to tray and restores on double-click

title: Preferences survive reboot
steps_actions: Reboot the OS and relaunch TrackClick
steps_expected_result: Window position and all preferences are restored after reboot

title: Windows-only visual feature
steps_actions: Verify the Windows-only visual feature on Windows and confirm absence on macOS/Linux
steps_expected_result: Feature displays correctly on Windows and is not present on other platforms

title: macOS permission revocation
steps_actions: Revoke Accessibility permission while app is running
steps_expected_result: App degrades gracefully with no crash

title: Linux .deb install and click accuracy
steps_actions: Install the .deb then verify click position under scaling and multi-monitor
steps_expected_result: Package installs and launches and clicks land at the correct location
